query:
-- Layer 1: Platform AI Settings (global admin only)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS platform_ai_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  settingKey VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default' UNIQUE,
  baseSystemPrompt TEXT,
  defaultTone VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'professional',
  defaultResponseFormat VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'mixed',
  defaultResponseLength VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'standard',
  modelPreferences JSON,
  ensembleWeights JSON,
  globalGuardrails JSON,
  prohibitedTopics JSON,
  maxTokensDefault INT DEFAULT 4096,
  temperatureDefault FLOAT DEFAULT 0.7,
  enabledFocusModes JSON,
  platformDisclaimer TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Add model/ensemble/tone fields to organization_ai_settings (Layer 2)
ALTER TABLE organization_ai_settings
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS toneStyle VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'professional',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS responseFormat VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'mixed',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS responseLength VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'standard',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS modelPreferences JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ensembleWeights JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS temperature FLOAT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS maxTokens INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS enabledFocusModes JSON;

-- Add model/ensemble/tone fields to manager_ai_settings (Layer 3)
ALTER TABLE manager_ai_settings
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS organizationId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS toneStyle VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS responseFormat VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS responseLength VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS modelPreferences JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ensembleWeights JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS temperature FLOAT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS maxTokens INT DEFAULT NULL;

-- Add model/ensemble/tone fields to professional_ai_settings (Layer 4)
ALTER TABLE professional_ai_settings
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS organizationId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS managerId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS toneStyle VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS responseFormat VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS responseLength VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS modelPreferences JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ensembleWeights JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS temperature FLOAT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS maxTokens INT DEFAULT NULL;

-- Add model/ensemble fields to user_preferences (Layer 5)
ALTER TABLE user_preferences
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS modelPreferences JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ensembleWeights JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS temperature FLOAT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS maxTokens INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS customPromptAdditions TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS responseFormat VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'mixed',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS focusModeDefaults VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT 'general,financial';
